worktree.teardown: bun run dev:stop && rm -f apps/server/solar.db apps/server/solar.db-shm apps/server/solar.db-wal

commitMessage.instructions: Use conventional commits with a scope.  Make sure you include a standard single title line, a newline, and then a detailed description of the final changes.

pullRequest.instructions: Make sure you include a standard single title line, a newline, and then a detailed description of the final changes.  Never include a testing section
